headline: SK Hynix (KOSE:A000660) Ships HBM4E DRAM To AI Customers
summary: SK hynix has begun shipping its next generation HBM4E DRAM for AI customers, introducing a new high bandwidth memory product for intensive AI workloads. The HBM4E chips are designed to offer higher data processing speed, capacity, and improved heat resistance compared with prior HBM products. This product milestone is directly connected to SK hynix’s AI data center and high performance computing roadmap and follows earlier focus on its NVIDIA partnership. For investors tracking...

headline: Nvidia (NVDA) Stock Weighs AI Momentum Against Mixed Valuation Signals After 46% One-Year Gain
summary: With NVIDIA now trading at US$210.69, many investors are asking whether the stock’s current price still lines up with its underlying value or if expectations have run ahead of reality. The stock has returned 2.7% over the last week, eased 2.2% over the past month, and is up 11.6% year to date and 46.7% over the last year, with a very large 3 year gain of about 4x and an even larger 5 year gain in excess of 10x. Recent headlines around NVIDIA have continued to center on its role in powering...
